text: All comparables have been found in the subject's condominium development or in nearby competing developments. Due to recent sale price stability of condominium units in the market area, the comparables received no market time adjustment. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its inferior condition. Comparable #2 has received no adjustments. Comparable #3 has received no adjustments. See Comparable #4. The Income Approach was not developed due to a lack of market data.
